context: Tests whether the agent knows to use --error-on-warnings for CI (not the local dev check command), and places the lint step before tests in the workflow.

checklist.name: --error-on-warnings flag used
checklist.description: The Biome step in ci.yml uses bunx @biomejs/biome check . --error-on-warnings (not just biome check . without the flag)

checklist.name: Biome step runs before test step
checklist.description: The lint/check step appears before the bun test step in the job steps list

checklist.name: Uses bunx to invoke Biome
checklist.description: The command uses bunx @biomejs/biome (not npx biome or a global biome binary assumption)

checklist.name: bun install step present before Biome
checklist.description: bun install runs before the Biome step so the package is available
